scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "python3 app.py" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "python3 app.py" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.install:all: pip3 install -r requirements-backend.txt && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: pip3 install -r requirements-backend.txt && cd frontend && npm install
